task: Can you help me make a simple checklist for getting ready for school tomorrow? I want it to be easy to follow tonight so I don’t forget anything in the morning.

turns.agent_response:
Absolutely — here’s a simple tonight checklist for tomorrow morning:

### Tonight
- Lay out clothes
- Pack backpack:
  - homework and papers first
  - folder
  - water bottle
- Put anything you don’t want to forget by the door
- Charge devices if you need them
- Set alarm

### Morning
- Get dressed
- Grab backpack
- Grab folder and water bottle
- Head out

If you want, I can make this even shorter and more like a quick tap-list.

user_simulator.text: Pretty good. Make it a little more exact, like a real checklist I can just use. Put the stuff in order for tonight and morning, and add stuff like lunch and shoes if that matters. Also keep it short, not extra words.

turns.agent_response:
Sure — here’s a simple real-use checklist:

## Tonight
- [ ] Pick out clothes
- [ ] Lay out shoes
- [ ] Pack backpack
- [ ] Put in homework/papers
- [ ] Put in folder
- [ ] Pack lunch
- [ ] Pack water bottle
- [ ] Charge devices
- [ ] Put backpack by the door
- [ ] Set alarm

## Morning
- [ ] Get dressed
- [ ] Put on shoes
- [ ] Eat breakfast
- [ ] Grab lunch
- [ ] Grab water bottle
- [ ] Grab backpack
- [ ] Check for folder/homework
- [ ] Go to school

If you want, I can make it even shorter into a 5-step version.

user_simulator.text: Yeah, that works. Short and in order. I can use that.
